label: pipeline_quality_log
definition:
DAY-partitioned quality log. Pre-Dataform gate: validates silver_smart_money pair count=27, all_features freshness <48h, no duplicates, no NULL bias. gate_status=PASS unblocks Dataform gold trigger. gate_status=BLOCKED skips ml_ready rebuild.

**Live BQ stats** (as of 2026-04-21 10:01 UTC): 84 rows · 7 columns
long_description:
## pipeline_quality_log

**Layer:** Gate

**Rows:** 84  |  **Columns:** 7  |  **Last modified:** 2026-04-21 10:01 UTC

DAY-partitioned quality log. Pre-Dataform gate: validates silver_smart_money pair count=27, all_features freshness <48h, no duplicates, no NULL bias. gate_status=PASS unblocks Dataform gold trigger. gate_status=BLOCKED skips ml_ready rebuild.

**Gate contract:** Exit 0 = PASS (Dataform proceeds). Exit 1 = BLOCKED (Dataform skipped, ml_ready not rebuilt).

label: chronos_large_forecasts
definition:
Chronos 2 Large (amazon/chronos-t5-large) daily forecasts. 27 pairs × 30 horizon days = 810 rows/run. Columns: q10/q50/q90/mean_forecast, trend_direction, trend_strength_pct. Plus 37 covariate cols from chronos_input. Runs on L4 GPU Cloud Run (europe-west1). DAY partitioned, clustered pair/horizon_day.

**Live BQ stats** (as of 2026-04-21 10:33 UTC): 10,530 rows · 37 columns
long_description:

Plus 37 covariate cols from chronos_input. Runs on L4 GPU Cloud Run (europe-west1). DAY partitioned, clustered pair/horizon_day.

label: outcome_evaluation
definition: BQ view joining T-7 model predictions (Chronos q50/direction + TimeGPT q50/direction + Keras CNN direction) against actual ml_ready outcomes (close at T). Computes direction_correct (bool), mae, direction_confidence_delta. Training signal for RF meta-learner. Only populated when pipeline_quality_log = PASS for trailing 5 days.
long_description:
## outcome_evaluation

**Layer:** Meta

BQ view joining T-7 model predictions (Chronos q50/direction + TimeGPT q50/direction + Keras CNN direction) against actual ml_ready outcomes (close at T). Computes direction_correct (bool), mae, direction_confidence_delta. Training signal for RF meta-learner. Only populated when pipeline_quality_log = PASS for trailing 5 days.

**Status:** Planned. Runs Saturday only when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for trailing 5 days.

label: rf_calibration
definition: Weekly XGBoost meta-learner output. Trains on 273 ml_ready features + model predictions → actual outcome labels. Outputs per-pair confidence calibration weights: when to trust Chronos vs TimeGPT, which feature domains dominate in current regime (COT/macro/ICT/session). Stored in BQ, consumed by knowledge graph edge weights. Runs Saturday only when gate=PASS for trailing week.
long_description:
## rf_calibration

**Layer:** Meta

Weekly XGBoost meta-learner output. Trains on 273 ml_ready features + model predictions → actual outcome labels. Outputs per-pair confidence calibration weights: when to trust Chronos vs TimeGPT, which feature domains dominate in current regime (COT/macro/ICT/session). Stored in BQ, consumed by knowledge graph edge weights. Runs Saturday only when gate=PASS for trailing week.

**Status:** Planned. Runs Saturday only when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for trailing 5 days.

**Layer:** Gate

Dataform assertion (gold tag). Returns rows if any weekend bar in ml_ready has a non-null close. Validates that the weekend OHLCV nulling logic in session_labels is intact. Must return 0 rows.

**Gate contract:** Exit 0 = PASS (Dataform proceeds). Exit 1 = BLOCKED (Dataform skipped, ml_ready not rebuilt).

label: ict_rag (planned)
definition: ICT concept embeddings from YouTube transcript corpus. Vector store of ICT trading concepts (OB, FVG, BOS, STDV, dealing ranges, COT interpretation) queryable by model inference context. Enables LLM macro regime layer to ground predictions in ICT doctrine.
long_description:
## ict_rag (planned)

definition: Planned Cloud Run job. Runs Saturday after Chronos weekly. Trains XGBoost meta-learner on outcome_evaluation (T-7 predictions vs actuals). Only executes when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for all 5 trailing trading days. Writes confidence calibration to rf_calibration.
long_description:
## rf-meta-weekly (Sat, gate-gated)

Planned Cloud Run job. Runs Saturday after Chronos weekly. Trains XGBoost meta-learner on outcome_evaluation (T-7 predictions vs actuals). Only executes when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for all 5 trailing trading days. Writes confidence calibration to rf_calibration.

**Status:** Planned. Runs Saturday only when pipeline_quality_log=PASS for trailing 5 days.

label: build-ict-pivots-daily (09:30 UTC)
definition: Cloud Run job. Runs build_ict_pivots.py (--all --incremental). Detects and stores ICT Smart Money Concepts per pair/timeframe: swing highs/lows, BOS, CHoCH, FVG, Order Blocks, liquidity levels, market structure bias, 60d anchor range, bar pivot point. Writes to silver_smart_money. Mon-Fri 09:30 UTC (after build-all-features, before validate-pipeline).
long_description:

label: treasury_cot
definition: US Treasury and financial futures COT positioning data. Separate from currency futures cot_data — covers Treasury bond futures, equity index futures, and other financial instrument positioning reported by CFTC. Active BQ table in forex_pipeline dataset.
long_description:
## treasury_cot

**Layer:** Bronze

US Treasury and financial futures COT positioning data. Separate from currency futures cot_data — covers Treasury bond futures, equity index futures, and other financial instrument positioning reported by CFTC. Active BQ table in forex_pipeline dataset.

**Update cadence:** See scheduler node for trigger details.

label: model_predictions_v2
definition: Parallel inference output table. Two-model fusion: Keras Dealer CNN (direction/confidence/price_target/volatility_regime/bias from SEQ_LEN=60 1h bars) + Perplexity 1.4B 4-bit LLM (RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/NEUTRAL macro regime applied to JPY/CHF crosses). Fusion logic: if models agree → confidence ×1.05; if disagree → Keras direction, confidence ×0.70; if LLM unavailable → Keras alone. MONTH partitioned, europe-west2. Written by parallel_inference.py in 4GB Cloud Run container.
long_description:
## model_predictions_v2

**Layer:** Model

Parallel inference output table. Two-model fusion: Keras Dealer CNN (direction/confidence/price_target/volatility_regime/bias from SEQ_LEN=60 1h bars) + Perplexity 1.4B 4-bit LLM (RISK_ON/RISK_OFF/NEUTRAL macro regime applied to JPY/CHF crosses). Fusion logic: if models agree → confidence ×1.05; if disagree → Keras direction, confidence ×0.70; if LLM unavailable → Keras alone. MONTH partitioned, europe-west2. Written by parallel_inference.py in 4GB Cloud Run container.

**Inference:** Cloud Run job. Reads Gold tables, writes forecast output to BQ.

label: parallel-inference (planned Cloud Run)
definition: Planned Cloud Run job (4GB container, europe-west2). Runs parallel_inference.py after Dataform gold rebuild. Loads Keras CNN (~800MB) + Perplexity 1.4B 4-bit (~700MB). Reads ml_ready 1h bars (SEQ_LEN=60), runs both models, fuses outputs, writes to model_predictions_v2. Not yet scheduled — model files exist locally (production_dealer_master_model_v2_seasonals.h5).
long_description:

**Layer:** Scheduler

Reads ml_ready 1h bars (SEQ_LEN=60), runs both models, fuses outputs, writes to model_predictions_v2. Not yet scheduled — model files exist locally (production_dealer_master_model_v2_seasonals.h5).

**Infrastructure:** Google Cloud Run Job + Cloud Scheduler. europe-west2 region unless noted.
